reviews.review_msg: This class has a weekly labs with lots of assignments. Some assignments were due after the course ended which interfered with studying for finals. Course was not too bad but it was easy to lose focus as it was 3 hours longs and content was boring. Lab midterm was super straightforward and no unfair questions.

Christina was great for 304, but the style of her exams were different, but not necessarily a bad thing. you could tell she wanted the students to do well and knew what she was doing but sometimes she'd get lost in what she was trying to explain. Overall quite good though!

Great explainer, I learned more stats in this course than the actual stats course. Tells stories to keep the class entertaining and very patient when asking questions. Only thing I personally didn't like was having to write the whole paper from a sole "how to" link despite the fact that it's 50%, but that's to do with class setup than Richard
GREATEST PROFESSOR OF ALL TIME. If you haven't had him for a class you are missing out!!

The course content is very dry but the course as a whole is not mind blowing hard. All thats needed is to get him on your good side and make him feel bad for you then you will get extra marks if not a whole letter grade higher!! No lie!!!!!

Super good guy. Course is difficult and the lectures are long, but he is very knowledgeable, caring, and reasonable. Holds consistent office hours and is very approachable. Highly recommend attending them if you have questions. Exams are tough, but he scales them. Overall, a solid choice.

Very kind and intellectual guy, but an A in this class with his teaching style is virtually impossible. This course has nothing to do with BPK. Its a statistics course. There are so many graded components to this course; essentially all of which are difficult. Lectures are long and its very tough to stay engaged. Wouldnt recommend

AVOID. Gave us 2 hours for a 3-hour online exam, where one of the LONG answer questions we couldn't even do because he never gave us enough information and didnt scale. Grading criteria is not clear at all and he expects absolute perfection. Lectures were rushed and meh at best. Nice enough but bad for this class.
